args.query: SELECT Id, ShippingState FROM Account WHERE ShippingState IS NOT NULL

val_args.query: SELECT Id, ShippingState FROM Account WHERE ShippingState IS NOT NULL

args.code:
import pandas as pd
import re

# Load data
cases = pd.DataFrame(env['data_1'])
accounts = pd.DataFrame(env['data_2'])

# Clean IDs
cases['accountid'] = cases['accountid'].astype(str).str.replace('^#', '', regex=True).str.strip()
accounts['Id'] = accounts['Id'].astype(str).str.replace('^#', '', regex=True).str.strip()

# Convert dates
cases['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['createddate'])
cases['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['closeddate'])

# Calculate closure time
cases['closure_time'] = (cases['closeddate'] - cases['createddate']).dt.total_seconds()

# Filter for past 6 quarters from 2022-10-26
# 6 quarters = 1.5 years = 18 months
# 2022-10-26 minus 18 months = 2021-04-26
start_date = pd.to_datetime('2021-04-26', utc=True)
end_date = pd.to_datetime('2022-10-26', utc=True)

cases_filtered = cases[(cases['createddate'] >= start_date) & (cases['createddate'] <= end_date)]

# Merge
merged = pd.merge(cases_filtered, accounts, left_on='accountid', right_on='Id', how='inner')

# Group by state and calculate average closure time
state_avg = merged.groupby('ShippingState')['closure_time'].mean().sort_values()

print(state_avg)

val_args.code:
import pandas as pd
import re

# Load data
cases = pd.DataFrame(env['data_1'])
accounts = pd.DataFrame(env['data_2'])

# Clean IDs
cases['accountid'] = cases['accountid'].astype(str).str.replace('^#', '', regex=True).str.strip()
accounts['Id'] = accounts['Id'].astype(str).str.replace('^#', '', regex=True).str.strip()

# Convert dates
cases['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['createddate'])
cases['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['closeddate'])

# Calculate closure time
cases['closure_time'] = (cases['closeddate'] - cases['createddate']).dt.total_seconds()

# Filter for past 6 quarters from 2022-10-26
# 6 quarters = 1.5 years = 18 months
# 2022-10-26 minus 18 months = 2021-04-26
start_date = pd.to_datetime('2021-04-26', utc=True)
end_date = pd.to_datetime('2022-10-26', utc=True)

cases_filtered = cases[(cases['createddate'] >= start_date) & (cases['createddate'] <= end_date)]

# Merge
merged = pd.merge(cases_filtered, accounts, left_on='accountid', right_on='Id', how='inner')

# Group by state and calculate average closure time
state_avg = merged.groupby('ShippingState')['closure_time'].mean().sort_values()

print(state_avg)
